preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)
notes: v0.7.8: Documents workspace separation, SDK import fix for packaged builds, macOS code signing, workspace auto-sync on update.
whatsNew: Workspace now lives in Documents/Merlin — your brands are always accessible
Packaged app SDK connection fix — no more 'tried 3 times' errors
Auto-sync: app updates bring new commands without touching your data
